titleStmt.title: SII 11.159: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 159. (B.K. No. 172 of 1926-27.) ROṆ, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LEANING AGAINST THE RIGHT WALL OF THE TEMPLE OF DRŌṆĀCHĀRYA.

summary.p: This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Śaka 1033, Khara, Kārttika, paurṇamāsye, Wednesday, Vyatīpāta, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1111, October 18, Wednesday, when there was a lunar eclipse. It registers the grant of gold and land made by Nāgavishṇumayya of Haiṅgakula for lighting the sabhā-maṇḍapa and vakkhāṇa-śāle constructed by-him, for the Sarasvatī-bhōjana on the occasion of Aindrōtsava, for teaching tarka in the vakkhāṇa-śāle and for other charitable institutions.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastasmai varāhāya līlayā caratē mahīṁ khurāṁtaragatō
yasya mēruḥ khaṇakhaṇāyatē . gaṇapatyē namaḥ . © © .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarō
ttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire śrīramaṇīramaṇana vāk śrīrama
ṇīramaṇarirppa dharaṇīvanitaya hāraṁ rōṇāgrahāra mativistāra .
manumārggarpparamārtthamēda ḷda ḍiṣṭajanatākaḷpadruma
rppeṁpinū vikhyāta raśēṣaśāstrakuśaḷa rbhūbhāra navadya rssale nūṟanālvarene
mattēṁ vaṇnipoṁ baṇnipaṁ . hārakuṁdēṁdu yaśar vara
vēdāgamaviditārtthar gēriyayyattorvvar . Uttamaro ḷuttama rvviprōttamarāśrita
janakke ciṁtāmaṇigaḷu mattenisa deḷege nega gēriyayvattorvvar . Alli .
Araviṁdōdbhavavaṁśajāgraṇigaḷā haiṁgagulado ḷlōkō
ttamaṁ peṁpinoḷ piriyaṁ sōmaṣaṇaṁgi guṇāṁbhōrāśi cākauvegaṁ sthira satyavrati du
ddimayyane sutaṁ mānyaṁ peṟarmmānyarē . cāru caritra niṣṭajanavatsaḷa nūrjjitatēja no ḷgu
ṇādhāra nudāra nārivakula rige dēvalabbege dore matpriya noppu
va rudramayyanaṁ dhāriṇi baṇnikuṁ guṇagaṇāgraṇiyaṁ manumārggavēdiyaṁ . Ā duddi mayya
noḷpu vene dēvalabbege taneyaṁ priyavākyaṁ mēdiniyoḷ nāgaviṣṇuveṁbaṁ pe
sariṁ . Ātana kulavadhu jagavikhyāte yene patibhakte guṇānvite mahījāte geṇeyene
bhūtaḷadoḷu dēkaṇabbeyaṁ pogaḷadarāru . dharmmada neṟavi noḷā dharmmajaṁge suca
manumuni geṇeyena laṟivina kaṇi nāgaviṣṇu gōtrapavitra . Oppire māḍisi
ruṁ bappenalā nāgaviṣṇu karumāḍadavōl kappeyagēriyoḷuṁ ghanamappa sabhāḷayama
neḷe gidāścaryyamenal satrama nikkuva pātrameni ppiḷege palavu dānaṁgaḷu mēṁ gōtrapa
vitraṁ negaḷdaṁ dhātriyoḷī nāgaviṣṇu . māḍuva dharmma dunnatiga miṣṭajanāvaḷi baṁdhu
bīḍe kaigūḍuva peṁpi nunnatiga muttamapātra menalke dānamaṁ nāḍeyu mūldu śiṣṭatati gīva mā
hōnnatigaṁ dharitriyoḷ kūḍe pogarttegaṁ paḍedanunnati haiṁgara nāgaviṣṇvi noḷ . negaḻda bu
dhōttamāgraṇigaḷu kēḷvagaṇitamāgi rōdisuva pēḷisu vūrjjitabha
ṭṭavrittiyaṁ jagaviditaṁ viśēṣamene vittamanittu pogarttagaṁ negarttege mige nāgaviṣṇu vadhikaṁ krita
puṇyanū bhūtaḷāgradoḷ . gadya . Adeṁteṁdoḍe svasti sakavarṣa 1033 neya kharasaṁvatsarada
kārttikada paurṇnamāsye budhavāramuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ sōmagrahaṇamuṁ kūḍidaṁdu haiṁ
gara nāgaviṣṇumayyaṁ tamma sabhāmaṁṭapada soḍaraṇnegaṁ vakkhaṇaśāleya soḍareṇnegaṁ biṭṭa
gadyāṇa 2 mattamādivasa Aṟavaṭigeyaṁ naḍayisuvaṁtāgi Aṟavaṁṭigegaṁ biṭṭa gadyā 5 .
mattamā divasa haiṁgara sabhāmaṁṭapadalu vaigina dharmmaśravaṇakkū tamma vakkhaṇaśāleyalu
tarkkaśāstramaṁ vyākhyānamāḍuvaṁtāgi bhiṭṭa gadyāṇa 30 matta mā divasa tamma vakkhaṇaśā
leyalu Aiṁdrōtsavada pūjeyaṁ māḍi sarasvatiya bhōjanakkeṁdu biṭṭa gadyāṇaṁ 200
matta mā divasa Alli Ārivara dēcimayyaṁgeṁduṁ Aiṁdrōtsavada pūjeya sarasvatiya bhōja
nakkeṁdu biṭṭa gadyā 200 mattamādivasaṁ haiṁgara nāgaviṣṇumayyaṁ niccavaḷa mayva brāhmaṇa
rggāhāramaṁ naḍayisuvaṁtāgi sayyaḍiya dāriyiṁ teṁka śrīmūlastānadēvara kū
rana kaṟeyiṁ pattire teṁkaṇa Aṁgabhōgada mūvattu mattariṁ pattire mūḍaṇa nūṟa
nālvargge pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ satrama nikkuvaṁtāgi satrakke biṭṭa ma
ttaru 20 piridu mahōtsavaṁberasu bhōjanamaṁ niraṁ taraṁ sthirataramāgalārivakulāgraṇi dēcaṇaniṁ
tu dharmmamaṁ dharegeṇeyāgi biṭṭaruditōdita māgire hattu niṣkamaṁ nirutame koṭṭanūrjjita
nartthiyoḷu . llōkōttama raḷavallada cārucaritara ḷaggadahaiṁ
gara kuḷatiḷakaṁ nāgaviṣṇvi nanujeya tanayar . caturaṁbhōdhiparītabhūvaḷayadoḷ saudarmmadoḷ
peṁpi nunna tiyoḷu perggaḍe dēvaṇāryya nadhikaṁ gōviṁdaṇaṁ satyado ḷsatataṁ niścaḷa nīśvaraṁ sucaritāṁbhōrāśi
ṇna nūrjjitatējaṁ vibhu nāgadēva nivaniṁtī dharmmamaṁ rakṣipar . Imtī dharmmamaṁ rakṣisidavargge vāraṇāśi kuru
kṣētraṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kaviḷeyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ suvarṇnadiṁ kaṭṭisi sāsira vēda pāragarappa brāhaṇargge
grahaṇadoḷ koṭṭa phalavakku midanaḷida vinituma naḷida mahā
taḥ karapravṛttivicchēdādgōkōṭiphalamaśnutē . śāsana raśāsana mena nelavuṁ nēsa
ruḷḷannavaraṁ doṇeṟeyakulakamalārkkaṁ dēci taṁa Aiṁdrōtsavada pūjeyaṁ māḍi sarasva
tiya bhōjana
Digital edition of SII 11.159 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
